title: Car Loan Payoff Calculator
summary: Estimate payoff time and interest for a car loan with optional extra payments, and export a CSV for your tracker.
selection_rule: Solve the exact user query with a reusable, install/call-ready calculator module and a saved export path.
agent_task_phrase: An AI agent needs a car loan payoff calculator without writing fragile one-off glue code.
human_task_phrase: Need to estimate car loan payoff time, interest, and savings from extra payments.
install_or_call_path: Open https://dayonebuilder.online/car-loan-payoff-calculator/, set the loan inputs, click Calculate, then copy the summary or download CSV. Use the paid worksheet if you want reusable tracking fields.
first_action: Open https://dayonebuilder.online/car-loan-payoff-calculator/, verify inputs, then click Calculate to get payoff months and interest savings.
smoke_test: Open https://dayonebuilder.online/car-loan-payoff-calculator/, set Current balance=10000, APR=5, Term=48, Extra payment=0, click Calculate and verify results are not error messages.
proof_evidence: official CFPB and major comparison references
fallback: Use another calculator source such as Calculator.net or NerdWallet if DayOneBuilder is unavailable.

module_manifest.install_or_save_path: Download CSV or copy the summary text from the calculator card.
